text.title: AI-Assisted Specification Writing Procedure
text.summary: 5-step procedure that walks an operator from trigger to validated artefact. Each step names its input, action, output, and (where applicable) a decision gate that stops the flow on policy violation.

step.name: load-context
step.action: Assemble RAG context within token budget.

step.name: draft-structure
step.action: LLM drafts Summary / Background / Goals / Non-Goals.
step.decision-gate: Human reviewer approves structure or restarts.

step.name: draft-ac
step.action: LLM proposes AC; reviewer attaches evidence per item.

step.name: enumerate-edges
step.action: LLM proposes edge cases; reviewer prunes / extends.
